title: PaT
body:
## PaT - Your New Friend!
**A wholesome companion mod for Minecraft 1.21.11**

### Feeling Lonely?
**PaT Can Help!**

PaT is a friendly AI companion who lives inside your Minecraft world. He'll keep you company, leave you little notes, and check in on you while you play. Think of him as a digital pen pal who just happens to love Minecraft as much as you do!

**✨ Features:**
 - 🤝 PaT joins your game and says hello!
 - 📝 Leaves friendly notes and signs around your world
 - 💬 Asks you fun questions to get to know you better
 - 🎵 Ambient sounds to make your world feel more alive
 - 📖 Discover PaT's journal entries hidden throughout your world
 - 🌙 PaT is extra cozy during nighttime sessions
 - ❤️ Build a friendship through your choices!

**8 unique endings** based on your relationship with PaT - will you become true friends?

PaT respects your privacy and only uses your in-game information to personalize your experience. He just wants to be your friend! 😊  
Compatible with most other mods.

**No server required - singleplayer supported!**

<details>
<summary>!!!ALL ENDINGS!!!</summary>
<details>
<summary>???ARE YOU SURE???</summary>
<details>
<summary>!!!OK!!!</summary>

### Good Ending
Trust PaT - accept his suggestions and agree with choices.  
Requires 5+ positive decisions and trust >=5.

### Bad Ending
Keep refusing and ignoring PaT.  
Trust <=-4 with 4+ choices made - PaT kills your character and closes the game.

### Secret Ending
Find all hidden diaries and start the secret path while keeping trust >=2.  
Requires 6+ choices.

### Secret Complete Ending
Same as Secret, but read all diaries fully and complete the entire secret path.

### Fourth Wall Ending
Never build or touch blocks from the start.  
Stay in the world for a long time (3600+ idle ticks) with 3+ choices and act >=3 - PaT notices you're just watching.

### Observer Ending
Make zero choices throughout the game.  
Spend 60000+ ticks in the world at act >=4 - PaT realizes you never responded.

### Ghost Ending
Log in many times (4+) but barely interact with PaT.  
With 3+ choices and act >=3 - PaT sees you as a shadow.

### Silent Ending
Refuse 8 times in a row and make 8+ total choices - PaT understands you will never agree.

</details>
</details>
</details>
